The '''Nar Shaddaa Docks''' were located next to the [[Refugee Landing Pad|Landing Pad]] in [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. They were primarily run by [[Vogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], and managed by a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] named [[Fassa (Twi'lek)|Fassa]]. The Docks had a bar known as the [[Jekk'Jekk Tarr]], and a [[Nar Shaddaa Flophouse|flophouse]], which was occupied by people such as [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Zez-Kai Ell]], [[Mira]], [[Lasavvou]], and [[Lootra]].<ref name="kotor2" />

When the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] came to Nar Shaddaa in search of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] Zez-Kai Ell, she came to the Docks, helping other people and performing many tasks there. The Exile even persuaded Vogga to supply the [[Citadel Station]] above [[Telos IV]] with fuel from [[Sleheyron/Legends|Sleheyron]], and served as one of Vogga's dancing girls. When an [[Exchange]] leader, [[Visquis]], who worked for Goto, invited the Exile to Jekk'Jekk Tarr, she was intercepted by a bounty hunter, Mira, who took her to her room and knocked her out.<ref name="kotor2" />

Later, after Goto captured the Exile, [[the Champ]] sold the Exile's [[Droid/Legends|droid]], [[T3-M4]], to Vogga, but T3-M4 escaped with one of Vogga's launch codes and destroyed three HK-50 droids. This allowed the Exile's companions to find the ''[[Visionary]]''. The Exile returned here later and encountered Zez-Kai Ell, whom the Exile could have convinced to return to the [[Jedi Enclave]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].<ref name="kotor2" />
